text:
WIC: Nutrition Education | Sutter County, CA
Show/Hide
ROAD CLOSURES
COMMUNITY ACADEMY
WIC offers a wide variety of classes to meet the needs of your family. Whether you’re pregnant, caring for a newborn, or feeding a busy toddler, we’re here to support you every step of the way.
Nutrition Classes
Most classes are
one-on-one over the phone
, so we can tailor the information to your family’s needs and help you feel confident in your choices.
Topics may include:
Breastfeeding basics
Newborn feeding
Knowing when it’s too soon for solid foods
General nutrition classes that rotate every three months so there’s always something new to learn!
Online Education
WIC also has an online education platform. At
WICHealth.org
you can find:
Personalized nutrition classes
for pregnancy, postpartum, infants, and young children
Healthy recipes
your whole family will love
Meal planning tools
to make shopping and cooking simpler
Visit
WICHealth.org
to explore or ask a WIC staff today!
Nutrition Support
You can always ask your
WIC staff
any general nutrition questions — we’re here to help with tips and guidance for your family’s unique needs.
We also have
registered dietitians
who can assist with more complex nutrition questions or medical conditions.
WIC is here to help support you and your family stay healthy and thrive.
Last Updated February 12, 2025
